S.FORM: == qalang maku ga Cinsbu == aring sa silung lpgun kin waqiq nya ga kaybat qutux seng pitu' kbhul spat pgan kin waqiq nya.
S.PHON: == qalaŋ maku ɣa ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu == ariŋ s~ɕa s~ɕiluŋ lpɣun kin waqiq nja ɣa kajβat qutux s~ɕeŋ pituʔ kβħul s~ɕpat pɣan kin waqiq nja.
S.FORM: == qalang maku ga Cinsbu == aring sa silung lpgun kin waqiq nya ga kaybat qutux seng pitu' kbhul spat pgan kin waqiq nya.
S.PHON: == qalaŋ maku ɣa ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu == ariŋ s~ɕa s~ɕiluŋ lpɣun kin waqiq nja ɣa kajβat qutux s~ɕeŋ pituʔ kβħul s~ɕpat pɣan kin waqiq nja.
